headline: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Transport Equipment & Leasing Industry
summary: Headwinds, including inflation, tariff-related tensions, and lingering supply-chain disruptions, hurt the Zacks Transportation - Equipment and Leasing industry. WAB, AER and R are likely to stand out.
